meta.summary: Barrnap 1.10.6 runtime for annotating microbial RNA features from FASTA/GenBank/FASTQ inputs and writing GFF3 output.
meta.description: Barrnap 1.10.6 runtime for annotating microbial RNA features from FASTA/GenBank/FASTQ inputs and writing GFF3 output.

test: barrnap --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'barrnap 1.10.5' >/dev/null && barrnap --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Rapid microbial RNA annotationn' >/dev/null && barrnap --listdb > /tmp/taf-barrnap-listdb.txt 2>&1 && grep -F -- "--kingdom 'bac' has: tRNA tmRNA CDS ncRNA rRNA" /tmp/taf-barrnap-listdb.txt >/dev/null && grep -F -- "--kingdom 'arc' has: tRNA tmRNA CDS ncRNA rRNA" /tmp/taf-barrnap-listdb.txt >/dev/null && grep -F -- "--kingdom 'fun' has: tRNA tmRNA CDS ncRNA rRNA" /tmp/taf-barrnap-listdb.txt >/dev/null

micromamba list -n base | grep -E 'barrnap[[:space:]]+1\.10\.6[[:space:]]+' >/dev/null && cmsearch -h 2>&1 | grep -F '# INFERNAL 1.1.5' >/dev/null && cmscan -h 2>&1 | grep -F '# INFERNAL 1.1.5' >/dev/null && aragorn -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'ARAGORN v1.2.41' >/dev/null && bedtools --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'bedtools v2.31.1' >/dev/null && seqkit version 2>&1 | grep -F 'seqkit v2.13.0' >/dev/null && diamond --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'diamond version 2.2.1' >/dev/null && ziggypep -v 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'ziggypep 0.3.1' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-barrnap-rrna-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; barrnap --quiet --threads 1 --kingdom bac /opt/barrnap/share/test/small.fa > "$tmp/small.gff" 2> "$tmp/run.log"; test -s "$tmp/small.gff"; grep -F '##gff-version 3' "$tmp/small.gff" >/dev/null; grep -F 'Name=16S_rRNA' "$tmp/small.gff" >/dev/null; grep -F 'Name=23S_rRNA' "$tmp/small.gff" >/dev/null; grep -F 'Name=5S_rRNA' "$tmp/small.gff" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-barrnap-all-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; barrnap --quiet --threads 1 --all --outseq "$tmp/rna.fa" --incseqreg --incseq --addids /opt/barrnap/share/test/small.fa > "$tmp/all.gff" 2> "$tmp/run.log"; test -s "$tmp/all.gff"; test -s "$tmp/rna.fa"; grep -F '##sequence-region' "$tmp/all.gff" >/dev/null; grep -F '##FASTA' "$tmp/all.gff" >/dev/null; grep -F 'ID=16S' "$tmp/all.gff" >/dev/null; grep -F 'Dbxref=Rfam:' "$tmp/all.gff" >/dev/null; awk -F '\t' '$3 == "tRNA" || $3 == "tmRNA" {found=1} END {exit !found}' "$tmp/all.gff"; awk -F '\t' '$3 == "ncRNA" || $3 == "CDS" {found=1} END {exit !found}' "$tmp/all.gff"; rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-barrnap-bad-kingdom-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; if barrnap --kingdom wrong /opt/barrnap/share/test/nohits.fa > "$tmp/run.log" 2>&1; then cat "$tmp/run.log" >&2; exit 1; fi; grep -F 'Imvalid --kingdom' "$tmp/run.log" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: Barrnap
upstream.license: GPL-3.0; bundled database resources include Rfam CC0 and UniProt/Swiss-Prot CC-BY-4.0-derived data
upstream.citation: Seemann T. Barrnap: BAsic Rapid Ribosomal RNA Predictor. https://github.com/tseemann/barrnap
